---
name: Data source request
about: Request a new dataset or data integration
title: "[data] "
labels: ["data", "P2-medium"]
---

## Data source request

**Dataset:** (e.g. FactSet Estimates, Revere supply chain, 13F ownership)
**Provider / API:** (FactSet API product, or other)
**Fields needed:**
**Point-in-time available?:** (yes/no — required for any backtest use)
**Update frequency:** (daily / quarterly / event-driven)
**Which signals/modules will consume it?:**
**Entitlement confirmed?:** (do we have API access for this product?)
**New data contract required?:** (which Pydantic schema in `schemas.py`?)
